tagline: Civic space for the digital age
taglineBody: Public infrastructure, not a private platform. Real identity, not anonymity. Discourse, not disruption.
needInvite: You need an invite to join

invitePhase.title: Invite Phase
invitePhase.description: Eulesia grows through personal invitations. Each member can invite 5 others, building a trust network of active citizens.

noAttentionEconomy.title: No attention economy
noAttentionEconomy.description: No algorithmic feed, no infinite scroll, no engagement metrics. Your time is yours.

institutions.title: Institutions as participants
institutions.description: Public institutions participate as civic actors, not advertisers or "verified brands".

socialNotSurveillance.title: Social, not surveillance
socialNotSurveillance.description: Connection with communities and neighbors. No data harvesting, no ad targeting.

pleaseLogin: Please log in to view your profile
